problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
（　）に正しい関係代名詞を入れなさい。
「The boy ( ) is playing soccer is my brother.」
problems.correct_answer: who
problems.hint_1: 先行詞が「人」の場合は who を使います。
problems.hint_2: The boy（人）なので who を使います。
problems.explanation_base: The boy who is playing soccer is my brother.（先行詞＝人→who）

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
（　）に正しい関係代名詞を入れなさい。
「I have a dog ( ) can run fast.」
problems.correct_answer: that
problems.hint_1: 先行詞が「動物・物」の場合は which/that を使います。
problems.hint_2: a dog（動物）なので which または that が使えます。
problems.explanation_base: I have a dog that can run fast.（先行詞＝動物→that/which）

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
（　）に正しい関係代名詞を入れなさい。
「She is the woman ( ) helped me.」
problems.correct_answer: who
problems.hint_1: 先行詞が「人」の場合は who を使います。
problems.hint_2: the woman（人）なので who を使います。
problems.explanation_base: She is the woman who helped me.（先行詞＝人→who）

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
（　）に正しい関係代名詞を入れなさい。
「This is the book ( ) I bought yesterday.」
problems.correct_answer: that
problems.hint_1: 先行詞が「物」の場合は which/that を使います。
problems.hint_2: the book（物）なので that または which が使えます。
problems.explanation_base: This is the book that I bought yesterday.（先行詞＝物→that/which）

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
（　）に正しい関係代名詞を入れなさい。
「The car ( ) is parked there is mine.」
problems.correct_answer: that
problems.hint_1: 先行詞が「物」の場合は which/that を使います。
problems.hint_2: The car（物）なので which または that が使えます。
problems.explanation_base: The car that is parked there is mine.（先行詞＝物→that/which）

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
次の2文を関係代名詞でつなぎなさい。
「I know a girl. She speaks French.」
problems.correct_answer: I know a girl who speaks French.
problems.hint_1: 先行詞（a girl）が人なので who を使います。
problems.hint_2: I know a girl + who + speaks French の形にします。
problems.explanation_base: I know a girl who speaks French.（関係代名詞 who）

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
次の2文を関係代名詞でつなぎなさい。
「I have a book. It was written by Soseki.」
problems.correct_answer: I have a book that was written by Soseki.
problems.hint_1: 先行詞（a book）が物なので that/which を使います。
problems.hint_2: I have a book + that + was written by Soseki の形にします。
problems.explanation_base: I have a book that was written by Soseki.（関係代名詞 that）

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
次の2文を関係代名詞でつなぎなさい。
「The man is my teacher. He taught me English.」
problems.correct_answer: The man who taught me English is my teacher.
problems.hint_1: 先行詞（The man）が人なので who を使います。
problems.hint_2: The man + who + taught me English は my teacher の形にします。
problems.explanation_base: The man who taught me English is my teacher.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
次の2文を関係代名詞でつなぎなさい。
「This is the song. I like it best.」
problems.correct_answer: This is the song that I like best.
problems.hint_1: 先行詞（the song）が物なので that/which を使います。
problems.hint_2: This is the song + that + I like best の形にします。
problems.explanation_base: This is the song that I like best.（関係代名詞 that）

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
（　）に正しい関係代名詞を入れなさい。
「Is there anything ( ) I can do for you?」
problems.correct_answer: that
problems.hint_1: 先行詞が anything（不特定のもの）の時は that を使います。
problems.hint_2: anything のような先行詞には that がよく使われます。
problems.explanation_base: Is there anything that I can do for you?（関係代名詞 that）

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
日本語を英語に直しなさい。
「あの背が高い男性が、私の父です。」
problems.correct_answer: The tall man who is standing there is my father.
problems.hint_1: 先行詞が人なので who を使います。
problems.hint_2: The tall man + who + is standing there の形にします。
problems.explanation_base: The tall man who is standing there is my father.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
日本語を英語に直しなさい。
「彼女は私に親切にしてくれた人です。」
problems.correct_answer: She is the person who was kind to me.
problems.hint_1: 先行詞が人なので who を使います。
problems.hint_2: She is the person + who + was kind to me の形にします。
problems.explanation_base: She is the person who was kind to me.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
日本語を英語に直しなさい。
「私が昨日読んだ本はとても面白かったです。」
problems.correct_answer: The book that I read yesterday was very interesting.
problems.hint_1: 先行詞が物なので that/which を使います。
problems.hint_2: The book + that + I read yesterday の形にします。
problems.explanation_base: The book that I read yesterday was very interesting.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
日本語を英語に直しなさい。
「彼が買った犬は毎日走ります。」
problems.correct_answer: The dog that he bought runs every day.
problems.hint_1: 先行詞が動物なので that/which を使います。
problems.hint_2: The dog + that + he bought の形にします。
problems.explanation_base: The dog that he bought runs every day.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
日本語を英語に直しなさい。
「私が訪れた国はとても美しかったです。」
problems.correct_answer: The country that I visited was very beautiful.
problems.hint_1: 先行詞が物・場所なので that/which を使います。
problems.hint_2: The country + that + I visited の形にします。
problems.explanation_base: The country that I visited was very beautiful.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
（　）に正しい関係代名詞を入れなさい。
「The student ( ) won the prize is my friend.」
problems.correct_answer: who
problems.explanation_base: The student who won the prize is my friend.（先行詞＝人→who）

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
（　）に正しい関係代名詞を入れなさい。
「I saw a bird ( ) could talk.」
problems.correct_answer: that
problems.explanation_base: I saw a bird that could talk.（先行詞＝動物→that/which）

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
次の2文を関係代名詞でつなぎなさい。
「She is a nurse. She works at a hospital.」
problems.correct_answer: She is a nurse who works at a hospital.
problems.explanation_base: She is a nurse who works at a hospital.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
（　）に正しい関係代名詞を入れなさい。
「This is the film ( ) everyone liked.」
problems.correct_answer: that
problems.explanation_base: This is the film that everyone liked.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
日本語を英語に直しなさい。
「彼が住んでいる家は大きいです。」
problems.correct_answer: The house that he lives in is big.
problems.explanation_base: The house that he lives in is big.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
（　）に正しい関係代名詞を入れなさい。
「The teacher ( ) teaches me math is nice.」
problems.correct_answer: who
problems.explanation_base: The teacher who teaches me math is nice.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
（　）に正しい関係代名詞を入れなさい。
「I lost the key ( ) I found yesterday.」
problems.correct_answer: that
problems.explanation_base: I lost the key that I found yesterday.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
（　）に正しい関係代名詞を入れなさい。
「I want a dog ( ) doesn't bark.」
problems.correct_answer: that
problems.explanation_base: I want a dog that doesn't bark.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
次の2文を関係代名詞でつなぎなさい。
「She is a singer. She sings beautifully.」
problems.correct_answer: She is a singer who sings beautifully.
problems.explanation_base: She is a singer who sings beautifully.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
次の2文を関係代名詞でつなぎなさい。
「This is a movie. Everyone loves it.」
problems.correct_answer: This is a movie that everyone loves.
problems.explanation_base: This is a movie that everyone loves.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
日本語を英語に直しなさい。
「私が最も尊敬している人は私の母です。」
problems.correct_answer: The person that I respect most is my mother.
problems.explanation_base: The person that I respect most is my mother.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
日本語を英語に直しなさい。
「彼は私が話していた男性です。」
problems.correct_answer: He is the man who I was talking about.
problems.explanation_base: He is the man who I was talking about.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
日本語を英語に直しなさい。
「この写真は彼が5年前に撮ったものです。」
problems.correct_answer: This is the picture that he took five years ago.
problems.explanation_base: This is the picture that he took five years ago.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
日本語を英語に直しなさい。
「私が好きな音楽のスタイルはジャズです。」
problems.correct_answer: The music style that I like is jazz.
problems.explanation_base: The music style that I like is jazz.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
日本語を英語に直しなさい。
「彼女が発見した問題は非常に難しかったです。」
problems.correct_answer: The problem that she discovered was very difficult.
problems.explanation_base: The problem that she discovered was very difficult.
